<!--
  ARTIFACT CHAIN CONTRACT
  Written by:   planner
  Reads:        PRD (templates/prd.md output), HLD/ADR if one exists
  Consumed by:  coder (one Task block at a time — each Task must be self-contained),
                test-generator (Testing notes per task)
  Rule:         a Task block must carry everything coder needs WITHOUT reading the full
                PRD: context excerpt, exact files, steps, verification. (Self-contained
                task carries all context coder needs.)
-->
# Implementation Plan: {{title}}

**Generated by:** planner agent
**Date:** {{date}}
**Source PRD:** {{prd_path}}

**Goal:** {{one sentence describing what this builds}}
**Architecture:** {{2-3 sentences about approach; link ADR if one exists}}
**Tech Stack:** {{stack}}

---

## File Structure

<!-- Map every file created/modified BEFORE defining tasks — this locks decomposition. -->

| File | Create/Modify | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|----------------|
| {{path}} | {{create or modify}} | {{one line}} |

## Task Breakdown

<!-- Tasks are VERTICAL slices (each cuts through all layers and is verifiable on its
     own), not horizontal layers. Target ≤ 1 day each. Order by dependency. -->

### Task {{n}}: {{component name}}

**Covers:** {{story/FR ids from the PRD, e.g. Story 1, FR-001}}
**Depends on:** {{task numbers or "none"}}
**Estimate:** {{S | M | L}}

**Context (self-contained):**
{{2-5 sentences: everything coder needs to know from the PRD/ADR for THIS task —
acceptance criteria excerpt, relevant decisions. Coder must not need other documents.}}

**Files:**
- Create: {{exact/path}}
- Modify: {{exact/path}}
- Test: {{exact/path}}

**Steps:** <!-- bite-sized, TDD order; each step is one action -->
- [ ] Write the failing test: {{test name + what it asserts}}
- [ ] Run it — confirm it fails for the right reason ({{expected failure}})
- [ ] Implement the minimal code to pass
- [ ] Run the test suite — all green
- [ ] Refactor if needed, re-run tests
- [ ] Commit: `{{commit message}}`

**Verification:** {{exact command + expected output}}

---

## Risks

| Risk | Likelihood | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| {{description}} | {{low/med/high}} | {{mitigation}} |

## Plan Self-Review

<!-- Run before handing off. These are PLAN FAILURES if present:
     "TBD", "TODO", "handle edge cases", "similar to Task N", steps without commands. -->

- [ ] Every PRD story/FR maps to at least one task (list gaps if any)
- [ ] No placeholder steps; every code step shows the actual change intent
- [ ] Names/types used in later tasks match earlier tasks

---

## Handoff → coder

**Next agent:** coder (one task at a time, in dependency order)
**Inputs to provide:** this plan (path) + the single Task block to implement
**Blocking items:** {{unresolved risks/decisions, or "none"}}
